fields.title: Beginner Full Body Forge
fields.summary: A simple full-body session using squats, push-ups, rows, and core work.
fields.instructions:
Warm up for five minutes.
Complete three rounds of 10 squats, 8 push-ups, 10 rows, and a 30-second plank.
Cool down and stretch.

fields.title: Premium Conditioning Builder
fields.summary: A higher-intensity conditioning workout for active FitForge members.
fields.instructions:
Complete five rounds of 20 jumping jacks, 12 lunges, 10 squat thrusts, and a 45-second plank.
Rest one minute between rounds.
